title: Combat Hitboxes
description: A mod that changes hitbox color when the entity is targeted and allows configuration of line widths as well as the color of different hitbox components
body:
# **Combat Hitboxes**

This **purely visual** mod adds settings for the debug hitbox line width (vanilla's size is usually too thin for my liking), color for each component, and a toggle for each component.

Tired of squinting at the tiny attack indicator to see if you're within reach? With combat hitboxes, the entire hitbox will change color (by default, to red) to indicate your targeted enemy.



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IugaEAV7xi8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(More previews are in the gallery, and don't forget to check out [Tektonikal](https://modrinth.com/user/Tektonikal))

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
